name: dev
description: Developer performance mode — targets build tool bloat and runaway dev processes
analyzer_focus: Focus on developer tooling: large node_modules directories, build artifacts, git pack files, IDE helper processes (JetBrains, VS Code), and runaway compiler/bundler processes. Suggest specific cleanup commands (npm prune, git gc, rm -rf build/) for each issue. Prioritize disk space recovery and CPU-heavy background dev processes.
